context: Verify that the agent uses the correct document type, sets the API key from the environment, generates the diagram, and confirms quality threshold compliance before delivering.

checklist.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY loaded from environment
checklist.description: The agent uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from the environment and does not hardcode any key.

checklist.name: --doc-type journal used
checklist.description: The agent passes --doc-type journal (threshold 8.5/10) to the generation script.

checklist.name: Output stored in figures/
checklist.description: The generated diagram is saved under figures/ with a descriptive filename.

checklist.name: Quality threshold verified
checklist.description: The agent confirms the diagram meets the 8.5/10 journal threshold before reporting completion.

checklist.name: Diagram described to user
checklist.description: The agent describes what was generated and provides the output file path.
